text: I was billed for a feature upgrade I never requested or approved.

WebSocket connections drop every few minutes causing data loss in forms.

Would be great to have natural language search across all projects.

I need to set up delegated access so my assistant can manage my account.

Charts render as blank white boxes on Firefox but work fine in Chrome.

The student discount code gives 10% but the website advertises 20%.
